name: Spiced Apple Rings
recipeIngredient: 12 pounds Firm tart apples (maximum diameter 2-1/2 inches)
3/4 cup Red hot cinnamon candies OR
recipeInstructions:
Yield: About 8 to 9 pints
Procedure:
1. Wash apples.
2. Peel and slice one apple at a time.
3. Cut crosswise into 1/2-inch slices, remove core area with a melon baller.
4. To make flavored syrup, combine sugar water, vinegar, cloves, cinnamon candies or cinnamon sticks, and food coloring in a 6-quart saucepan.
5. Stir, heat to boil, and simmer for 3 minutes.
6. Drain apples, add to hot syrup, and cook for 5 minutes.
7. Fill jars (preferably wide-mouth) with apple rings and hot flavored syrup, leaving 1/2-inch headspace.
8. Adjust lids and process according to the recommendations in Table 1.
Table 1. Recommended process time for Spiced Apple Rings in a boiling-water canner.
Style of Pack: Hot. Jar Size: Half-Pints or Pints.
Process Time at Altitudes of 0 - 1,000 ft: 10 minutes
1,001 - 6,000 ft: 15 minutes
Above 6,000 ft: 20 minutes
